calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2023 Off Calendar

Motion And Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-13-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Jessie August Viera

Dept:505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:42:27 a.m. and concluding at 9:56:27 a.m. (D505)

Robert Javan, Esq. appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff Allied Universal and XL Specialty Insurance Company via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Jessie August Viera not appearing.

Plaintiff's complaint for personal injury filed November 9, 2020
Statement of damages filed November 9, 2020.
Proof of personal service filed October 21, 2021
1st amended statement of damages filed September 21, 2021
Dismissal filed as to Doe Defendants on September 21, 2021
2nd amended statement of damages filed October 6, 2023

The Court inquires as to an offer of proof. Counsel refers to a declaration by Adrienne Waugh filed with the Court on September 25, 2023.

Counsel orally requests the Court for an order shortening time and to request a waiver of witness to proceed by declaration.

The Court orally grants Counsel's request.

Counsel to summarize the facts of the case.

Plaintiff submits the following exhibit/s for the Court's review:
Exhibit A: Payment Summary

The Court finds that the Plaintiff has proved its prima facie case. The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:

Damages $2,456,760.60
Costs $755.00
Interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0

Total $2,457,515.60

Judgment is signed and executed this day.
